mapper.select: select spu_id, category_id, shop_id, name, selling_point, main_img_url, img_urls, price_fee, market_price_fee, status, stock, sale_num, seq from spu where spu_id = #{spuId} and status != -1

select spu_id, category_id, shop_id, name, selling_point, main_img_url, img_urls, price_fee, market_price_fee, status, stock, sale_num, seq from spu
order by seq asc, spu_id desc limit #{begin}, #{size}

select count(1) from spu where shop_id = #{shopId} and status = 1
and (category_id = #{categoryId} or category_id in ( select category_id from category where parent_id = #{categoryId} and status != -1 ))
mapper.insert: insert into spu (category_id, shop_id, name, selling_point, main_img_url, img_urls, price_fee, market_price_fee, status, stock, sale_num, seq) values (#{categoryId}, #{shopId}, #{name}, #{sellingPoint}, #{mainImgUrl}, #{imgUrls}, #{priceFee}, #{marketPriceFee}, #{status}, #{stock}, #{saleNum}, #{seq})
mapper.update: update spu set category_id = #{categoryId}, name = #{name}, selling_point = #{sellingPoint}, main_img_url = #{mainImgUrl}, img_urls = #{imgUrls}, price_fee = #{priceFee}, market_price_fee = #{marketPriceFee}, status = #{status}, stock = #{stock}, seq = #{seq} where spu_id = #{spuId}
update spu set status = #{status} where spu_id = #{spuId}
mapper.select: select count(1) from spu where category_id = #{categoryId} and status != -1
mapper.update: update spu set stock = stock - #{count} where spu_id = #{spuId} and stock >= #{count}
update spu set stock = stock + #{count} where spu_id = #{spuId}
update spu set sale_num = sale_num + #{count} where spu_id = #{spuId}
